content_type: slogan graphic with article quote card
description: Department of Labor card in portrait format combining a photograph, a slogan, and an embedded text panel. The top half is a photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark suit and red tie speaking into a microphone at a podium, in front of a rippling American flag with red and white stripes; the photo fades into a dark navy background. Overlaid in large serif type is the text 'America FIRST!' with the word 'FIRST!' in heavy bold capitals. The bottom half is a white rounded text panel headed with the masthead 'THE NATIONAL LAW REVIEW', containing two paragraphs of serif body text stating that the DOL announced a partnership with the EEOC under 'Project Firewall' to increase enforcement against employers engaging in unlawful national-origin discrimination and hiring practices that disadvantage American workers, and noting data sharing and coordinated guidance regarding hiring that may prefer nonimmigrant visa holders (such as H-1B) over U.S. workers.
notable_text: America FIRST! | THE NATIONAL LAW REVIEW | DOL ... partnership with the EEOC under Project Firewall to intensify enforcement against ... hiring practices that disadvantage American workers
